RULING:
Plaintiff did not advise Defendants of her appearance today. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Carol Bigsby Harris, Plaintiff Propria Persona
RULING:
Plaintiff did not notify Defendants of her appearance today. The Court's tentative ruling is adopted: DEFENDANT OCWEN FEDERAL BANK FSB and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT:
1st Cause of Action (set aside trustee's sale): SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend; no opposition filed.
2nd Cause of Action (cancel trustee's sale): SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend; no opposition filed.
3rd Cause of Action (quiet title): SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend; no opposition filed.
4th Cause of Action (accounting): SUSTAINED without leave; no opposition filed.
5th Cause of Action (fraud): SUSTAINED without leave; no opposition filed.
6th Cause of Action (injunctive relief): SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend; no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Eric Houser, Esq., Houser & Allison (949) 679-1111 for Defendant and Moving Party Ocwen Federal Bank
Carol Bigsby Harris, (415) 333-0503, Plaintiff Propria Persona and Opposing Party
RULING:
A R G U E D: DEFENDANT OCWEN FEDERAL BANK, FSB'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: 3rd Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend to plead that Ocwen has claimed title to the property, if Plaintiff can do so in good faith; 4th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend to plead what money Plaintiff wants an accounting of with respect to Ocwen; 5th Cause of Action is OVERRULED; 6th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend to state a cause of action for which injunctive relief is appropriate. If no amended complaint is filed, the 3rd, 4th and 6th Causes of Action will be SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Attorney Houser to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
